cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out the answer to the question: In the story, fitting a working telephone booth _ . The options are A, B, C, D. So the timeline here is: 1 year ago phone line installed, then 6 months later (which would be 1.5 years ago from now?), the booth was put up. Wait, but the man is here now, months later again. So six months after the line was installed, which was a year ago, meaning the booth was installed 6 months ago. Then after that, the painter came days later. Now, the man is here again "months later," so maybe another few months. So the entire process from line installation to the current time is more than 1.5 years? But the question is about fitting a working telephone booth. The actual installation of the booth was done six months after the line was installed. But the story later mentions that the telephone man says the minister will come next month to inaugurate it. So even though the booth is physically there, it's not yet working. The headman and others are treating the number as important, but the phone isn't active yet. So the fitting of a working booth hasn't happened yet.
